name: Garlic Chicken (Oriental) Low Fat
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the chicken breasts into 2-inch square pieces.
2. In a medium bowl, mix together marinade ingredients: cornstarch, chicken stock, garlic, salt, sugar, soy sauce, and water.
3. Add the chicken pieces to the marinade and mix well. Let stand for at least 20 minutes.
4. Heat sesame oil in a wok over medium heat. Add the marinated chicken pieces and stir-fry until almost cooked, about 3-4 minutes. Remove the chicken and drain over the wok. Set aside.
5. Dissolve cornstarch in chicken stock to make a paste. Set aside.
6. In the same wok, add the cooked chicken, garlic, water chestnuts, and bamboo shoots. Stir-fry for about 2 minutes.
7. Add salt, sugar, soy sauce, and water. Cover and cook over low heat for 10 minutes.
8. Add the cornstarch paste and stir-fry until the sauce thickens slightly, about 30 seconds. Stir in the remaining sesame oil.
9. Serve hot. Makes 4 servings.
